annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under NMSA 1978, Sec. 56-8-4(B) — 10% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from New Mexico’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
